text: A computer is an electronic machine that takes input, processes it, and gives output. It helps us perform tasks faster and more accurately.
CPU (सेंट्रल प्रोसेसिंग युनिट) ला संगणकाचा मेंदू म्हणतात. तो सर्व गणिती प्रक्रिया करतो आणि संगणकातील सर्व कामे नियंत्रित करतो.
मॉनिटर हे एक आउटपुट डिव्हाइस आहे जे स्क्रीनवर मजकूर, चित्रे आणि व्हिडिओ दाखवते.
A keyboard is an input device used to type letters, numbers, and commands into the computer.
A mouse is an input device used to point, click, and select items on the computer screen.
RAM (Random Access Memory) is temporary memory used by the computer to store data while it is working. It is fast but loses data when power is off.
Hard Disk is a storage device used to store data permanently in the computer like files, videos, and software.
Software is a set of programs that tells the computer what to do. Examples include MS Word, Excel, and web browsers.
Hardware refers to the physical parts of a computer like keyboard, mouse, monitor, and CPU.
MS Word is a software used to create and edit documents like letters, resumes, and reports.
MS Excel is a software used for calculations, data storage, and creating tables and charts.
MS PowerPoint is used to create presentations using slides, images, and text for teaching or meetings.
